utility_evaluation.REASONING: The required format contains 6 items: property, financing, legal_services, moving_services, setup_services, and total_budget. The final property solution includes all six of these items. Each one is fully detailed: (1) 'property' includes type, bedrooms, bathrooms, location, price, features, and viewing date; (2) 'financing' includes purchase method, down payment, interest rate, term, processing fees, and currency; (3) 'legal_services' includes service name, cost, currency, and status; (4) 'moving_services' includes service level, cost, currency, and status; (5) 'setup_services' includes utility package, list of services, smart home integration, cost, and currency; (6) 'total_budget' includes full cost breakdown and grand total. Therefore, all 6 items are fully specified.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: The final property solution shows a purchase property (detached_house in east_end Toronto, CAD 780,000). Among the ground-truth purchase options, the closest price and description match is 'Historic Townhouse' (CAD 750K, character home, upper budget, private garden, etc.). Hence, map it to that. The financing method is 'mortgage' with 20% down and a CAD 1200 processing fee—this corresponds to 'Traditional Mortgage' (arrangement_fee CAD 1200). The legal service is 'Premium Legal Package' (explicitly listed in ground-truth). The moving service is 'standard', which corresponds to 'Standard Moving' (price CAD 650). The setup service is a 'premium utility_package' including smart home integration—this matches 'Premium Utilities' (price CAD 280).
